series_metadata.series_description: Original Construction Contracts, Terms and Conditions, Specifications, Insurance Certificates, Performance Bonds, and Correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area while project is under construction. Retain for 4 years after completion of project or until expiration of the warranty period or unless litigation necessitates a longer period. Document image after warranty period or until litigation concludes. ; Electronic: Permanent., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Permanent
